mapper.select: SELECT id FROM tb_user WHERE phone=#{phone} AND status=1
SELECT name, photo, gender, phone FROM tb_user WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user
name LIKE CONCAT("%",#{name},"%")
AND JSON_CONTAINS(roles,CONVERT(#{roleId},CHAR))
AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user SET name=#{name}, gender=#{gender}, phone=#{phone}, roles=#{roles}, status=#{status}
mapper.select: SELECT name, gender, phone, roles, status FROM tb_user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET name=#{name}, gender=#{gender}, phone=#{phone}, roles=#{roles}, status=#{status} WHERE id = #{id}
